zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert d'Estouteville I於大約1010年出生在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥延麥延時，他的父親Roger de Verdun21歲，母親d'Estouteville17歲。他和Jeanne de Talbot至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1090年在法國諾門迪享年81歲，埋葬在法國諾門迪瑟-馬利瓦爾蒙特。

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert d'Estouteville I was born about 1010, in Mayenne, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France, his father, Roger de Verdun, was 21 and his mother, d'Estouteville, was 17. He had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Jeanne de Talbot. He died in 1090, in Normandy, France, at the age of 81, and was buried in Valmont, Seine-Maritime, Normandy, France.

fr.Castle of Ambrieres, Mayenne, Maine/Pays: Mayenne, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert d'Estouteville I est né environ 1010, à Mayenne, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France, son père, Roger de Verdun, avait 21 ans et sa mère, d'Estouteville, avait 17 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Jeanne de Talbot. Il est décédé en 1090, à Normandie, France, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterré à Valmont, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, France.

de.Castle of Ambrieres, Mayenne, Maine/Pays: Mayenne, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich
de.lifeSummary: Als Robert d'Estouteville I um 1010 in Mayenne, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger de Verdun 21 und seine Mutter d'Estouteville 17. Er hatte mit Jeanne de Talbot mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1090 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Normandie, Frankreich und wurde in Valmont, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con Jeanne de Talbot. Morì nel 1090, nel Normandie, Francia, all'età di 81 anni, e fu sepolto a Valmont, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert d'Estouteville Iが約1010年にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメイエンメイエンで生まれた時，父Roger de Verdunは21歳，母d'Estoutevilleは17歳であった。彼はJeanne de Talbotとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1090年にフランスノーマンディで81歳で死去し，フランスノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメヴァルモントにて埋葬された。

ko.Castle of Ambrieres, Mayenne, Maine/Pays: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 메이니 메이니
ko.lifeSummary: Robert d'Estouteville I(이)가 대략 1010년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 메이니 메이니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger de Verdun(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 d'Estouteville(은)는 17세였다. 그는 Jeanne de Talbot(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1090년 프랑스 노먼디에서 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 노먼디 세이인-마이팀 발몽에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert d'Estouteville I nasceu aproximadamente 1010, em Mayenne, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, França, seu pai, Roger de Verdun, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, d'Estouteville, tinha 17 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com Jeanne de Talbot. Ele faleceu em 1090, em Normandie, França, com 81 anos, e foi sepultado em Valmont, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, França.

ru.Castle of Ambrieres, Mayenne, Maine/Pays: меиенн, меиенн, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert d'Estouteville I родился около 1010 г. в местности меиенн, меиенн, пеис де ла лоир, Франция, его отцу по имени Roger de Verdun было 21 год, а матери, которую звали d'Estouteville, 17. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Jeanne de Talbot. Он умер в 1090 г. в местности норманди, Франция в возрасте 81 год и был похоронен в местности валмонт, сине-маритим, норманди, Франция.
